roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 29D/CTS:29/FOP1:3 MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/PF390NEW/VF2:120/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/OR25/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLYSET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:TODAY'S PRELIMINARY HEARING VACATED,/TEXT:DEFTADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:002/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DISM3/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN (FTA 05-29-12 PREHEARING CONFERENCE)/BWDNC/X:COURT REFERS THE DEFENDANT TO CAHS/CONTD CAHS ELIG REPORT, DOP/CONTD:FOR CAHS ELIGIBILITY REPORT 06-06-12 IN DEPT 9/X: THE COURT WITH THE ASSISTANCEOF THE DA DAWSON DETERMINES THIS MATTER IS A LOVE WAIVER/CONTD PRELIM HRG,DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING 06-14-12 IN DEPT 9/DOP/
CONTD PROC RE BW;/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED ANDCONT'D/NP/X:NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 05-29-12,/X:BAIL SET AT $10,000/

/CAL:CAHS ELIG REPORT/X:COURT WAS INFORMED THAT CAHS IS FULL AND CAN NOT ACCOMMODATE DEFENDANT/OR/NTW60/LD:FOR PRELIM HEARING IS 07-02-12/CTORD:TO CHECK IN WITH SPR 3 TIMES PER WEEK/X:PRELIM HEARING IS VACATED/CONTD:PRE TRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/

CONTD SPR ELIG REPORT, DOP/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DENOF ALLEG/PD/X:PUBLIC DEFENDER'S ORAL DEMURRER AS TO COUNT 2 IS DENIED,/X:PUBLIC DEFENDER'S ORAL MOTION TO REDUCE COUNT 1 TO A MISDEMEANOR  PURSUANTTO PC 17(B) IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:PUBLIC DEFENDER'S ORAL MOTION TO RELEASE DEFENDANT ON OWN RECOGNIZANCE IS DENIED,/X:THE COURT REDUCES BAIL,/BAIL:25,000/NTW60/LD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 05-14-12/CONTD:CAHS ELIG REPORT ON 05-03-12/DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 05-10-12/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:PER DEPUTY, DEFENDANT IS 4011,5/BAIL:100,000/CTORD:BAIL SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/TWA/DOP/
/CAL:SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X:06-14-12 PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE CONFIRMED,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE & CAHS ELIG RPT ON 06-11-12/DOP/
